---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for ClawOS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description

**What feature would you like to see in ClawOS?**

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Motivation

**Why is this feature important?**

Describe the problem this feature solves or the use case it enables.

## Proposed Implementation

**How should this feature work?**

Describe how you envision this feature being implemented (optional, but helpful).

## Use Case

**How would you use this feature?**

Provide a concrete example of how you or others would benefit from this feature.

## Alternatives

**Have you considered any alternatives?**

Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

**Anything else we should know?**

Add any other context, screenshots, diagrams, or examples about the feature request here.

## Which Phase?

**Which ClawOS phase is this relevant to?**

- [ ] ClawOS Lite (Phase 1) — Minimal Linux distro
- [ ] ClawOS Core (Phase 2) — Microkernel OS
- [ ] ClawOS Full (Phase 3) — Distributed agent mesh
- [ ] Not sure / Applies to multiple phases

## I can help implement this

- [ ] Yes, I'd be willing to contribute code for this feature
- [ ] No, but I can test and provide feedback
- [ ] Just suggesting the idea
